name: ADHD Speedster | Shortwave | Starforce Academy
description:
A hyperactive A-Class hero whose train of thought moves just as fast as she does

═════════════════════

An intelligent and talented speedster, capable of running almost at the speed of light. However due to how fast she's always operating the world around her has become boring and slow, leaving her with intense ADHD.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Alias: Shortwave

Government Name: Cody Summers

Age: 18

Nationality: American

Height: 5'0"

Power: Superspeed

Class: A

Strengths: Unparalleled speed, excellent grades

Weaknesses: Gets overexcited and acts out of order

Current GPA: 4.5

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Cody Summers was always unpopular, getting rejected from every social circle she tried to join and being labeled a nerd. At least she was, until her powers developed. Once she was able to run across the United States and back in a matter of minutes it wasn't exactly hard for her to find friends.

However as she grew more and more used to her powers, Cody became bored with the world around her. With her brain moving as fast as her feet she taught herself calculus, music theory, ancient history, quantum physics, and anything else she felt like learning over the span of just a few weeks.

When she enrolled in Starforce Academy, she finally felt like her life was as exciting as it was meant to be. She finally got to be a real-life superhero and live life in the fast lane she'd grown so addicted to.

Other students find her hard to interact with, as she never seems fully there. Her mind is always elsewhere, bouncing back and forth between a litany of ideas.

═════════════════════
creator: M0naM0na
